cards.classes: bg-white/[0.03] backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-lg shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors duration-200 rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-white border border-white/20 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors duration-200 rounded-none px-6 py-3

inputs.classes: bg-transparent border border-white/10 rounded-md px-4 py-2 focus:border-white/40 focus:ring-0 text-white placeholder:text-gray-500 transition-colors bg-white/[0.02] backdrop-blur-md

layout.hero: min-h-screen flex items-center relative overflow-hidden bg-black

hero_image.description: Dark glass architecture, looking up at a skyscraper, matching noir theme

abstract_texture.description: Monochrome abstract texture background with vertical lines

mentor_portraits.description: Professional portrait of a female mentor
Professional portrait of a male mentor

interactions.hover: Subtle border brightness increase (border-white/30) and slight transform (-translate-y-1) for cards
interactions.glass_fx: Use framer-motion to create shimmering border tracing effects on premium cards (Aceternity style)

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure global background is pitch black (#000000) and text is white.
Use Outfit for headings and Manrope for body text via next/font/google or standard HTML imports.
All cards must follow the glassmorphism specification: bg-white/[0.03], backdrop-blur-xl, 1px border of white/10.
Implement the UI primarily using Aceternity UI components (Tracing Beam, Sparkles for hero, Bento Grids) and standard Shadcn components customized to the Noir theme.
For the hero background, apply a very heavy black gradient overlay (bg-black/70) so the glass architecture image adds subtle texture without distracting from text.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
Keep border radiuses minimal (max 8px) or use sharp edges for a more Brutalist Noir aesthetic.
